title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.450 - Applicability of sections 292.450 to 292.540
text:
292.450.  Applicability of sections 292.450 to 292.540. — The provisions of sections 292.450 to 292.540 shall apply only to cities that now have or may hereafter have a population of fifty thousand or more inhabitants.
(RSMo 1939 § 10234) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13277
